overview: QRE-Agent Platform v1.0 — Sovereign R&D Tax Credit Tracking System for InfluWealth Consult LLC. Tracks, classifies, and reports R&D activities for IRC §41 tax credit eligibility on the Internet Computer. Features deterministic keyword-based scoring, retroactive capture, admin approval workflows, and compliance-ready export.
features: IRC §41 deterministic classification engine with four-part test scoring
Retroactive R&D capture with guided chat UI
Activity logging with quantum-adjusted eligibility scoring
Admin approval workflow with full classification detail panel
User and global QRE value reports with CSV export
Audit trail for all state mutations
Stable memory persistence across canister upgrades
